name: Cottage Cheese and Oil Pastry
recipeInstructions:
There is no substitute I know of for this, check specialty stores.
1. Rub the cottage cheese through a fine sieve if desired, and mix with the milk, oil, sugar, vanillin sugar, and salt.
2. Mix and sift together the flour and Backin (baking powder).
3. Add the mixed flour and Backin to the cottage cheese mixture, a little at a time, until slightly more than half has been used.
4. Knead in the remaining flour.
This is the base for several recipes.
